snippets.description: CancelOperation is a utility method from google.longrunning.Operations.
snippets.title: managedkafka CancelOperation Sample

snippets.description:
CheckCompatibility check compatibility of a schema with all versions or a specific version of
a subject.
snippets.title: managedkafka CheckCompatibility Sample

snippets.description: CreateSchemaRegistry create a schema registry instance.
snippets.title: managedkafka CreateSchemaRegistry Sample

snippets.description: CreateVersion register a new version under a given subject with the given schema.
snippets.title: managedkafka CreateVersion Sample

snippets.description: DeleteOperation is a utility method from google.longrunning.Operations.
snippets.title: managedkafka DeleteOperation Sample

snippets.description: DeleteSchemaConfig delete schema config for a subject.
snippets.title: managedkafka DeleteSchemaConfig Sample

snippets.description: DeleteSchemaMode delete schema mode for a subject.
snippets.title: managedkafka DeleteSchemaMode Sample

snippets.description: DeleteSchemaRegistry delete a schema registry instance.
snippets.title: managedkafka DeleteSchemaRegistry Sample

snippets.description:
DeleteSubject delete a subject.
The response will be an array of versions of the deleted subject.
snippets.title: managedkafka DeleteSubject Sample

snippets.description:
DeleteVersion delete a version of a subject.
The response will be the deleted version id.
snippets.title: managedkafka DeleteVersion Sample

snippets.description: GetContext get the context.
snippets.title: managedkafka GetContext Sample

snippets.description: GetLocation gets information about a location.
snippets.title: managedkafka GetLocation Sample

snippets.description: GetOperation is a utility method from google.longrunning.Operations.
snippets.title: managedkafka GetOperation Sample

snippets.description:
GetRawSchema get the schema string for the given schema id.
The response will be the schema string.
snippets.title: managedkafka GetRawSchema Sample

snippets.description:
GetRawSchemaVersion get the schema string only for a version of a subject.
The response will be the schema string.
snippets.title: managedkafka GetRawSchemaVersion Sample

snippets.description: GetSchema get the schema for the given schema id.
snippets.title: managedkafka GetSchema Sample

snippets.description: GetSchemaConfig get schema config at global level or for a subject.
snippets.title: managedkafka GetSchemaConfig Sample

snippets.description: GetSchemaMode get mode at global level or for a subject.
snippets.title: managedkafka GetSchemaMode Sample

snippets.description: GetSchemaRegistry get the schema registry instance.
snippets.title: managedkafka GetSchemaRegistry Sample

snippets.description: GetVersion get a versioned schema (schema with subject/version) of a subject.
snippets.title: managedkafka GetVersion Sample

snippets.description: ListContexts list contexts for a schema registry.
snippets.title: managedkafka ListContexts Sample

snippets.description: ListLocations lists information about the supported locations for this service.
snippets.title: managedkafka ListLocations Sample

snippets.description: ListOperations is a utility method from google.longrunning.Operations.
snippets.title: managedkafka ListOperations Sample

snippets.description:
ListReferencedSchemas get a list of IDs of schemas that reference the schema with the given
subject and version.
snippets.title: managedkafka ListReferencedSchemas Sample

snippets.description: ListSchemaRegistries list schema registries.
snippets.title: managedkafka ListSchemaRegistries Sample

snippets.description:
ListSchemaTypes list the supported schema types.
The response will be an array of schema types.
snippets.title: managedkafka ListSchemaTypes Sample

snippets.description:
ListSchemaVersions list the schema versions for the given schema id.
The response will be an array of subject-version pairs as: 
[{"subject": "subject1", "version": 1}, {"subject": "subject2", "version": 2}].
snippets.title: managedkafka ListSchemaVersions Sample

snippets.description:
ListSubjects list subjects in the schema registry.
The response will be an array of subject names.
snippets.title: managedkafka ListSubjects Sample

snippets.description:
ListSubjectsBySchemaId list subjects which reference a particular schema id.
The response will be an array of subject names.
snippets.title: managedkafka ListSubjectsBySchemaId Sample

snippets.description:
ListVersions get all versions of a subject.
The response will be an array of versions of the subject.
snippets.title: managedkafka ListVersions Sample

snippets.description: LookupVersion lookup a schema under the specified subject.
snippets.title: managedkafka LookupVersion Sample

snippets.description:
UpdateSchemaConfig update config at global level or for a subject.
Creates a SchemaSubject-level SchemaConfig if it does not exist.
snippets.title: managedkafka UpdateSchemaConfig Sample

snippets.description: UpdateSchemaMode update mode at global level or for a subject.
snippets.title: managedkafka UpdateSchemaMode Sample
